message:
test(fr-conformance): XFAIL pfmerge_ttl_verify_ttl_after under live oracle (br-frankenredis-b2qs)

The fixture pins the expected PTTL to the exact value it was captured
with (60000), but the live oracle uses wall-clock time so by the time
the harness sends the subsequent PTTL 1–3ms have elapsed and upstream
returns 59998–59999. Filtering the single case keeps the test
STRICT-clean while the fixture-format adds optional integer tolerance
(tracked separately). core_hyperloglog now 118/118 pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
